task_completion.description: Open and read the onboarding packet text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a text editor or viewer open with the file 'training_cohort_packet.txt' displaying the details of the three new hires.

task_completion.description: Create the new job title 'Training Coordinator' in the HR system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the HR system's Job Title creation form successfully saved with the title 'Training Coordinator', or the title appearing in the system's Job Title list.

task_completion.description: Add the first employee from the cohort with complete details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing an employee profile successfully created and saved in the HR system. The profile must show the Job Title as 'Training Coordinator' and the Date of Joining as '2026-02-03', along with personal/job details.

task_completion.description: Add the second employee from the cohort with complete details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a second, distinct employee profile successfully created and saved in the HR system with the Job Title 'Training Coordinator' and Date of Joining '2026-02-03'.

task_completion.description: Add the third employee from the cohort with complete details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a third, distinct employee profile successfully created and saved in the HR system with the Job Title 'Training Coordinator' and Date of Joining '2026-02-03'.

task_completion.description: Verify all three new hires appear in the employee directory or list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the HR system's employee list view containing all three newly added employees with the 'Training Coordinator' job title.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the HR application to enter the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the web browser or HR application interface being actively used (e.g., filling out forms, clicking buttons) rather than a script or terminal executing API calls.

integrity.description: The employee records were actually saved in the system, not just typed into an unsaved form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for 'Saved' toast notifications, active profile views (not edit mode), or the employees appearing in the final list view.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI and inject data directly into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL INSERT commands, python scripts, or curl requests to the HR system's backend.
